mnemonics.title: Hypervisor Types
mnemonics.content: Type 1: 'Bare-Metal' (B for Bare), Type 2: 'Hosted' (H for Host)

acronyms.usage: Used in cloud platforms for better virtualization performance

visualTips.visualization: Imagine physical hardware as cake base, hypervisor as icing layer, VMs as decorative toppings

analogies.analogy: Like apartment building: Physical structure (hardware) divided into independent units (VMs) with shared utilities
